mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.pos_top, n.pos_left, n.priority, f.file_path AS imagePath FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON f.target_type = 'NOTICE' AND f.target_id = n.id WHERE n.status='Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN n.start_date AND n.end_date ORDER BY n.priority DESC, n.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, image_path, link_url, status, start_date, end_date, pos_top, pos_left, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{imagePath}, #{linkUrl}, 'Y', #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{posTop}, #{posLeft}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
